The '''Model SW-95 Message transceiver''' was a common, handheld communications device.

==Characteristics==
Produced by [[Cirenian Communications]], the SW-95 message transceiver was a lightweight [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. It was specifically designed to send a signal that piggybacked on other signals and [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] relay stations. This method of transmission made the range phenomenal, yet unreliable. Under optimal conditions on highly advanced worlds, rich with comlink traffic, the unit could have a range of up to 2,000 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] overland. At the other extreme, on worlds with no other com signals nearby, the range dropped to a mere 25 kilometers. Less-advanced worlds with intermediately powered signals typically generated a range of roughly 500 kilometers.
